top_noisy_items.question: Which of the following best describes a learned behavior?
Beavers build their homes in ponds and streams. Which characteristic is least critical to building homes in an aquatic environment?

Researchers at a science laboratory have found ways to make carbon nanotubes from recycled plastic grocery bags. These nanotubes are then used as components of batteries. This approach best illustrates the ability of technology to
A student walks to school one morning and notices the grass is wet but the streets are dry. Which of these processes most likely caused the grass to be wet?
An atom of chromium has 24 protons, 28 neutrons, and 24 electrons. How many subatomic particles are in the nucleus of a chromium atom?
Which characteristic of motion could change without changing the velocity of an object?

An unbalanced equation for the reaction of methane gas (CH_{4}) with oxygen is shown below. CH_{4} + \Box O_{2} -> 2CO_{2} + 4H_{2}O How many molecules of oxygen gas (O_{2}) are needed to properly balance this equation?
Two organisms mate and produce offspring. Which of the following statements best explains why the offspring are unable to reproduce?

If two tectonic plates are each moving in opposite directions away from the mid-ocean ridge at a rate of 10 millimeters per year, how long will it take for the ridge to become 100 millimeters broader?
One parent has brown eyes (BB) and has offspring with another parent who has blue eyes (bb). What is the probability that one of their children will have blue eyes?
Which object in the solar system is orbited by a belt of asteroids?

It was once thought that living organisms could come from non-living matter. For example, people believed that flies would develop from rotting meat. This idea was later disproved primarily because of
How is a skin cell from a mouse similar to an amoeba?

David makes a solution by dissolving 10 grams of salt in 100 ml of water. He wants a solution that is half as concentrated. What should he add to the original solution to obtain a solution that is about half as concentrated?
When there is an accidental spill in the lab, it is most important to know
Where does evaporation occur at the HIGHEST rate?

An astronaut drops a 1.0 kg object and a 5.0 kg object on the Moon. Both objects fall a total distance of 2.0 m vertically. Which of the following best describes the objects after they have fallen a distance of 1.0 m?

There are several theories that exist concerning the way dinosaurs became extinct. If new evidence is found that appears to challenge a particular theory on dinosaur extinction, what happens to the old theory?
An airplane flies in a straight line between two cities that are separated by 840 kilometers. If it takes 4 hours for the airplane to make the trip, what is its average speed?
A man ran on a treadmill for 1,800 seconds. At the end of his run, the treadmill indicated his energy output as 240,000 J. What average power did he generate?
During which activity should a student wear a laboratory apron or coat?
Which tool would be the most helpful in an investigation of the life cycle of a monarch butterfly?
Bromine (Br) is a liquid at room temperature. Oxygen (O) is a gas at room temperature. Room temperature is 25° C. Which of the following statements is true?
A student sets up an experiment to learn which colors of light are refracted by a prism. Which method will the student most likely use to collect data?
Which statement accurately describes an interaction between plants and animals?
Which change in Earth's surface is most directly related to the water cycle?
Which of these illustrates that sound waves can travel through two different types of media?
There are a total of eight planets that orbit the Sun. How many of the other planets orbit in the same direction as Earth?
Which nonrenewable resource is used extensively in computers and electronics?

Both euglenas and volvox are classified as plant-like protists. But volvox has more structures in common with plants than euglenas do. Which structure found in plant cells is also found in volvox but not in euglenas?
